title: AI Ticket Creator
description: Create an optimized betting ticket mixing fixtures and markets from all leagues based on statistical analysis and real-time odds.
total_odds_note: Total odds target: Hard constraint (exact match only)
legs_note: Legs: We'll try 5–15 legs and search for combos inside your target. Results vary per attempt.
use_live_odds_description: Fetch real-time odds for in-play fixtures (if available)
validation_min_max_odds: Min odds must be less than max odds
validation_min_max_legs: Min legs must be less than or equal to max legs
validation_min_odds_value: Min odds must be at least 1.01
green_buckets_leagues: Leagues: All verified leagues with ≥65% hit rate
green_buckets_markets: Markets: Goals Over (1.5/2.5/3.5) — data-verified odds bands
verified_selections_desc: Verified selections only — Data-driven from historical performance · Hit rate ≥65% · Odds ≤{{oddsCap}}
safe_mode_note: Safe mode supports max {{maxLegs}} legs. Odds range: {{min}}–{{max}}
no_matches_error: No matches in the next 48h meet Safe Zone rules (verified leagues + markets with ≥65% hit rate + odds ≤2.30). Try again later or expand the day range.
